overview.description: The GSR Crypto Core3 ETF (BESO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long cryptocurrency basket, short usd currency. The fund is a fund-of-funds, actively allocating evenly across three crypto assets and rebalancing weekly based on research-driven signals. The ETF also offers investors a chance to earn staking yields. BESO was launched on Apr 21, 2026 and is issued by GSR.

data.title: Andy Baehr on Bitcoin Exposure, BESO ETF & Why Solana Has More Upside
data.text: Andy Baehr breaks down the GSR Crypto Core3 ETF (BESO) and explains why investors may want crypto exposure in their core portfolio. He talks about Bitcoin's new trend of low volatility, growing trends...
